details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 30A transient slip for 34 ft powerboat
Task 2: Winter storage indoor vs outdoor decision and reservation
Task 3: Schedule 100-hour engine service with highest-rated technician
Task 4: Store flow - dock lines purchase and life jacket search with filters
Task 5: Register for next weekend boating safety course under $150 in afternoon
Task 6: Seasonal slip quote request and plan selection for 40 ft boat
Task 7: Haul-out & pressure wash with bottom paint add-on for 32 ft boat
Task 8: Fuel dock hours lookup and contact message submission
Task 9: Reserve indoor PWC rack storage under $500 per month for 3 months
